title: Sunetra Pawar to file nomination on April 6, contest won’t be unopposed in Baramati
description: The bypolls are slated to test MVA’s unity even as the Mahayuti will rally behind Sunetra Pawar for the Baramati bypolls; Ms. Pawar, who is the DCM at present, will have to get elected in either House of the legislature within six months of assuming office as the DCM
